lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm new in town and wanted to get to know the locals.

lines.speaker: Ali the Operator
lines.text: What do you want to know?

lines.speaker: Ali the Operator
lines.text: That information is available on a need to know basis and right now, you don't need to know.

lines.speaker: Ali the Operator
lines.text: Can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I'd like to ask you about something else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the other people in the town.

lines.speaker: Ali the Operator
lines.text: Sheep, ready for the slau... hang on. I shouldn't be telling you that. Just forget I said anything.

lines.speaker: Ali the Operator
lines.text: Can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Ali the Operator
lines.text: You will have to be a lot more specific if you want help finding him. Everyone here is called Ali.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've discovered that. Well he has an uncle called Ali Morrisane, a market vendor in Al Kharid and that's all I really know about him.

lines.speaker: Ali the Operator
lines.text: Say no more. I too am looking for him. The little tyke robbed me too, if we work together perhaps we can catch him and teach him a lesson.

lines.speaker: Ali the Operator
lines.text: Can I help you with anything else?
